title: Minecraft Transit Railway - DLR B07 Stock
description: The Docklands Light Railway's B07 stock, for MTR mod. Please keep in mind that it hasn't been tested with 4.0 yet.
body:
# If the doors and windows are invisible, make sure that "Hide translucent parts on vehicles" is toggled off.

The Docklands Light Railway's B07 stock, now available for the MTR mod!

![A B07 train making its way underground.](https://i.imgur.com/FyehpG8.png)

**Credits go to:**

**• Lt. Serg (me)** - Texturing

**• nooBotond** - Transparency

**• Bzu** - Train head

**• SirPiglin + Coinc1234** -  Original B90 texture

**• Curt** - Train sounds
